Casper has a visual impairment which means he is very short sighted, lacks some peripheral vision and struggles in low / no light situations. It generally doesn’t affect him day to day, but he is at higher risk of complications from head bumps or falls. Please do let us know if he has any bumps in class.
He has asthma so has an inhaler in his bag. Rarely needs it though.

Lenny is neurodivergent - with traits of ADHD and Autism. He is also gifted. He manages extremely well but may struggle with transitions and some subtle aspects of social communication. He may need reminders when following verbal instructions as he can become distracted by his thoughts and 'busy head'.
